name: coda
description: Agent-native IDE built on Tauri 2 + SolidJS

scripts.typecheck: bun --cwd packages/core run typecheck && bun --cwd packages/ui run typecheck && bun --cwd packages/app run typecheck
scripts.test: bun --cwd packages/core run test && bun --cwd packages/ui run test && bun --cwd packages/app run test
